# Dependencies: Form 1040 Line 33 — Total Payments

> Tax year 2025. Re-authored 2026-06-14 to match current program logic.
> Authoritative source: `lines/33.md`. Downstream lines 34/35a-d/36/37/38 covered in `dependencies/refund-and-amount-owed.md`.

---

## 1. Output

| Output field | Java model | Form 1040 destination |
|---|---|---|
| `Payments.totalPayments` | `Payments.java` | Line 33 — total payments |

Storage convention: **null-when-zero via ternary-at-setter** (Convention 1) at `TaxReturnComputeService.java:27313`:

```java
payments.setTotalPayments(line33.compareTo(BigDecimal.ZERO) > 0 ? line33 : null);
```

---

## 2. Top-Level Formula

```text
line33 = nz(line25d) + nz(line26) + nz(line32)

  line25d = line25a + line25b + line25c           (total withholding)
  line26  = sum of Q1–Q4 estimated installments + prior-year overpayment applied forward
  line32  = line27a + line28 + line29 + line30 + line31   (see dependencies/32.md)
```

Pure 3-addend summation; no new credit and no new threshold introduced at line 33. All component lines are finalized before line 33 is formed.

---

## 3. Inputs

### 3a. Direct addends (all upstream-computed)

| Addend | Computed by | `Payments.java` field | Form 1040 line |
|---|---|---|---|
| W-2 box 2 withholding | `sumFederalWithholdingFromEntries(w2Entries)` | `withholdingW2` | 25a |
| 1099-series / SSA-1099 / RRB withholding | `sumFederalWithholdingFromMultipleLists()` + `sumSsa1099Withholding()` | `withholding1099` | 25b |
| W-2G box 4 + Form 8959 line 24 | `sumFederalWithholdingFromEntries(w2gEntries)` + `form8959.line24` | `withholdingOther` | 25c |
| Total withholding | sum 25a + 25b + 25c | `totalWithholding` | 25d |
| Estimated tax | `computeLine26EstimatedTax()` | `estimatedTaxPayments` | 26 |
| Other payments + refundable credits | see `dependencies/32.md` | `totalOtherPaymentsAndRefundableCredits` | 32 |

### 3b. Statement inputs that contribute (via 25a–25c)

| Statement type | Field | Contributes to |
|---|---|---|
| `w-2` | `federalIncomeTaxWithheldAmount` (box 2) | Line 25a |
| `1099-R`, `1099-INT`, `1099-DIV`, `1099-B`, `1099-OID`, `1099-G`, `1099-NEC`, `1099-K`, `1099-MISC`, `1099-DA` | `federalIncomeTaxWithheldAmount` (box 4) | Line 25b |
| `ssa-1099` | `voluntaryFederalIncomeTaxWithheldAmount` (box 6) | Line 25b |
| `rrb-1099` | `federalIncomeTaxWithheldAmount` (box 10) | Line 25b |
| `rrb-1099-r` | `federalIncomeTaxWithheldAmount` (box 9) | Line 25b |
| `w-2g` | `federalIncomeTaxWithheldAmount` (box 4) | Line 25c |

### 3c. Personal form inputs feeding line 26

| Form ID | Fields | Flows to |
|---|---|---|
| `estimated-tax-payments-taxpayer` | `madeEstimatedTaxPayments`, `installment1Amount`..`installment4Amount`, `priorYearOverpaymentCredited`, `amendedReturnOverpaymentCredited` | Line 26 |
| `estimated-tax-payments-spouse` | Same fields (MFJ combined; ignored for MFS) | Line 26 (MFJ only) |

(All other personal forms feeding line 33 do so via line 32 — see `dependencies/32.md`. Downstream forms feeding line 34–38 — direct deposit, refund allocation, apply-to-next-year, prior-year tax — are documented in `dependencies/refund-and-amount-owed.md`.)

---

## 4. Compute Order

```text
1.  buildForm8959()                          # line 25c: form8959.line24
2.  computeAdoptionBenefits() / computeForm8863() / computeSchedule8812() / applyAdoptionCredit()  # set 28/29/30 pre-line-32
3.  Schedule 3 Part II apply-methods + finalizeSchedule3Totals()  # line 31 source
4.  computeLine20ThroughLine24()             # line 24 totalTax + line 22 taxAfterCredits
5.  computeLine31ThroughLine38() {           # entry at line 27089
       compute line 25a/25b/25c → line25d
       computeLine26EstimatedTax()           # → line 26
       computeLine27aEIC()                   # → line 27a (final value)
       re-set line 29 from form8863
       re-set line 30 from adoption
       line 31 from schedule3.line15
       compute line 32 (lines 27270-27291)
       *** compute line 33 here (lines 27293-27313) ***
       compute line 34 / 35a-d / 36 / 37 (Stage 1 pure)
    }
6.  computeForm2210()                        # at line 2075; sets totalPenalty
       → Stage 2 stack: AmountOwed.amountOwed += penalty (lines 2073-2088)
7.  computeForm8888()                        # after lines 34-37 finalized
```

Inline wiring at lines 27293-27313 (pure 3-addend sum + ternary setter):

```java
BigDecimal line33 = safeAmount(payments.getTotalWithholding())          // 25d
                  .add(safeAmount(payments.getEstimatedTaxPayments()))  // 26
                  .add(safeAmount(payments.getTotalOtherPaymentsAndRefundableCredits())); // 32
// non-negativity guardrail (33.md Gap A)
payments.setTotalPayments(line33.compareTo(BigDecimal.ZERO) > 0 ? line33 : null);
```

---

## 5. Non-Negativity Guardrail (33.md Gap A)

Each addend is non-negative by IRS construction. The backend installs a defensive paper-trail guardrail at `TaxReturnComputeService.java:27306-27312`:

```text
if (line25d < 0 OR line26 < 0 OR line32 < 0 OR line33 < 0):
    LOG.warnf("Line 33 non-negativity guardrail tripped — line25d=… line26=… line32=… line33=…")
```

Computation continues; this is a paper trail, not a hard block. Mirrors the line 32 guardrail at lines 27281-27289.

---

## 6. Form 2210 Reads 25d + 26 Directly — NOT Line 33

```text
Form 2210 line 9 = Payments.totalWithholding + sum(prior-year-tax payment1..4)
```

`computeForm2210()` at line 27626-27640 reads `payments.getTotalWithholding()` plus the per-period estimated payments from `prior-year-tax-taxpayer` directly. It does NOT route through line 33. Refundable credits (27a/28/29/30) feed Part I line 4 (subtracted from required-annual-payment base), NOT line 9. Line 33 is a Form-1040 page-2 reporting line; it is NOT the canonical "total payments" input to the underpayment-penalty computation.

---

## 7. Downstream Consumers

| Consumer | Reads | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| `Refund.overpaid` (line 34) | `line33 − totalTax` when `line33 > totalTax` | Overpayment amount |
| `AmountOwed.amountOwed` (line 37 pure) | `totalTax − line33` when `totalTax > line33` | Balance due |
| `computeForm2210()` | `totalWithholding + estTotal` (NOT line33) | Required-annual-payment comparison |
| `computeForm8888()` | `Refund.refundAmount` (derived from line 33) | Split-refund validation |
| Frontend `line33TotalPayments()` | stored backend value | PDF fill + display |
| Frontend fallback | `sumAmounts([line25dTotalWithholding(), payments.estimatedTaxPayments, line32OtherPayments()])` | Backward compat for older saved returns (dual-path recompute) |
| Form 1040 PDF — `line33_total_payments` | `payments.totalPayments` | CSV field `f2_29[0]` page 2 |

---

## 8. Refund vs. Amount-Owed Pivot (Mutual Exclusion)

```text
if (line33 > totalTax)   →  refund branch:    line 34 set; cascade to 35a/35b-d/36
else if (totalTax > line33) →  owed branch:   pure line 37 set; Form 2210 may stack into 38
else (line33 == totalTax) →  balanced:        neither Refund nor AmountOwed initialized
```

Both branches use strict inequalities. When `line33 == totalTax` exactly, neither `Refund` nor `AmountOwed` is lazy-initialized. The mutual exclusivity is structurally enforced — no validation flag needed.

Full downstream wiring (lines 34, 35a-d, 36, 37, 38) is documented in `dependencies/refund-and-amount-owed.md`.

---

## 9. MFS Mechanism — M2 Transitive Inheritance

Line 33 has no per-spouse code or MFS-specific logic. All 3 addends (25d / 26 / 32) handle MFS protection upstream via M2 transitive inheritance:

- 25d via per-statement withholding aggregation
- 26 via `estimated-tax-payments-{taxpayer,spouse}` (spouse form ignored on MFS)
- 32 via M2 through its 5 sub-addends

Pattern: M2 (transitive).

---

## 10. PDF Field Map (page 2)

| CSV semantic name | Source |
|---|---|
| `line25a_w2_withholding` | `payments.withholdingW2` |
| `line25b_1099_withholding` | `payments.withholding1099` |
| `line25c_other_withholding` | `payments.withholdingOther` |
| `line25d_total_withholding` | `payments.totalWithholding` |
| `line26_estimated_tax_payments` | `payments.estimatedTaxPayments` |
| `line32_total_other_payments_refundable_credits` | `payments.totalOtherPaymentsAndRefundableCredits` |
| `line33_total_payments` | `payments.totalPayments` |

Lines 34-38 PDF field map documented in `dependencies/refund-and-amount-owed.md`.

---

## 11. Validation Rules

- `line33 ≥ 0` always (defensive guardrail + IRS construction)
- `line33 = line25d + line26 + line32` exactly; no other addends
- `line34` (overpaid) and `line37` (owed) mutually exclusive — structural if/else-if
- Form 2210 line 9 uses `totalWithholding + estimated` directly, NOT line 33
- `line33 == totalTax` (balanced return) → neither Refund nor AmountOwed populated

---

## 12. Key 2025 Rules

- Line 33 is a pure summation pivot; no new credit, no new threshold
- IRS 2025 quarterly estimated due dates: April 15 / June 16 / September 15 / January 15, 2026
- MFJ: both spouses' estimated payments combined on one line 26
- MFS: only the filing spouse's estimated payments
- `$1` minimum refund rule (G3) — IRS will not auto-issue refunds < $1; **NOT enforced** in backend
- Form 2210 110% safe harbor when prior AGI > $150k ($75k MFS) — enforced

---

| ID | Priority | Description | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| G3 | LOW | `$1` minimum refund rule not enforced | **OPEN** (low priority) |
| G4 | LOW | Form 8888 PDF fill/export not implemented | **DEFERRED** — semantic assets published, fill code absent |
| G5 | LOW | Form 8888 / Form 8379 cross-check | **DEFERRED** — Form 8379 not implemented |
| G6 | LOW | Form 8888 IRA/HSA account types | **DEFERRED** — only Checking/Savings offered |
| G7 | OOS | Form 2210 Schedule AI (Box C) | **OUT OF SCOPE** |
| G8 | OOS | Form 2210 Box D actual withholding dates | **OUT OF SCOPE** |
| G9 | OOS | Form 2210-F (farmers/fishermen 66⅔%) | **OUT OF SCOPE** |
